case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY HENRY RANDALL BAIL BONDS $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,583.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT HENRY RANDALL BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-2000 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 301, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2000, DENIED FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF, NO EVIDENCE FUGITIVE DEFENDANT SURRENDER OR IN CUSTODY.
REIMBURSEMENT FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY HENRY RANDALL BAIL BONDS
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY HENRY RANDALL BAIL BONDS
